summary: Created 4 validation scripts: lint-contract-compliance.sh (24 static checks for hard-mode contracts), extended validate-wiring.sh with hard-mode system validation, extended validate-artifact.sh with hard-mode plan H8 checks, and validate-handoff.sh for orchestrator handoff JSON schema validation. All scripts pass on current codebase.

artifacts.summary: 4-phase implementation: static contract lint, wiring extension, artifact extension, handoff validator
